commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Hold your peace at the presence of the Lord GOD: for the day of the LORD is at hand: for the LORD has prepared a sacrifice, he has bidden his guests. Hebrew has, (Haydock) an interjection, (St. Jerome) like our hush. (Haydock) This denotes the importance of what he is going to say. The blood of the wicked is his victim, Jeremias xlvi. , and Ezechiel xxxix. (Calmet) The day of punishment is commonly styled the day of the Lord, Isaias ii. , and 1 Corinthians iii. (Worthington).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
